app.title: Vocabulary Quiz
app.finishedMessage: All verbs were completed. Nice work.

instructions.typeInstruction: ⌨️ Type the past form using the keyboard.
instructions.incorrectDot: ⚪ Gray dot = mistakes made, word repeats
instructions.hintDot: 🔴 Red dot = hint used, word repeats
instructions.hintMechanic: ❌ Wrong letters turn red. After 3 mistakes, a hint appears (red dot recorded).

gameplay.hintMessage: 💡 The correct letter is highlighted. Click it to continue.

englishQuiz1.title: English Quiz 1
englishQuiz1.description: Basic irregular verbs: run → ran, eat → ate, go → went

englishQuiz2.title: English Quiz 2
englishQuiz2.description: More irregular verbs: have → had, buy → bought, fly → flew

englishQuiz3.title: English Quiz 3
englishQuiz3.description: Mixed verbs including phrasal forms like wake up → woke up

germanAdjectives1.title: German Adjectives
germanAdjectives1.description: See the Czech meaning and type the German adjective
